channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Taylor Swift fans side with Caitlin Clark after Angel Reese interviews Travis Kelce's ex-girlfriend
item.description: Taylor Swift fans are flocking to support Caitlin Clark, a lifelong Chiefs fan, after Angel Reese interviewed the ex-girlfriend of Swift's boyfriend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL concussion protocol was followed when Bills QB Josh Allen was evaluated in Houston, league says
item.description: The NFL and its players association say the required steps were followed when Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen was evaluated for a concussion last week at Houston and cleared to return to the game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What is the story behind the iconic San Diego Chicken?
item.description: Fifty years ago, an iconic professional mascot emerged in San Diego, clad in bright orange and yellow feathers. For decades since, the San Diego Chicken has captivated fans with his comedic bits and sketches in various venues around the world.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Todd Downing tasked with helping Aaron Rodgers and Jets' struggling offense after 'unique week'
item.description: Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets’ offense appeared on their way toward the efficient, high-scoring and productive force they fully expected they’d be this season.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A.J. Foyt still drawing big crowds on or off the track in Indianapolis
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — As the sun sets on a perfect, late summer evening, A.J. Foyt sits inside his wine vault in Speedway, Indiana. He's getting regular updates on the expanding line that snakes around tables, through the bar, out the front door, down Main Street and around the corner for two blocks.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Adam Svensson has personal-best 60 to lead in Utah's return to PGA Tour after 61 years
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Adam Svensson made a 35-foot eagle putt he thought he had missed and closed with a birdie from the bunker for a career-best 11-under 60, giving him a two-shot lead Thursday in the Black Desert Championship as the PGA Tour returned to Utah for the first time in 61 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WNBA to expand Finals to 7-game series next season
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA will expand its Finals next year to a best-of-seven format, the league announced Thursday. The league currently has a best-of-five semifinals and finals in its playoffs with a best-of-three first round.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tennis legend Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KTLA 5

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mets win, advance to NLCS for the first time since 2015
item.description: NEW YORK — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Muggers ripped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's arm, police say
item.description:
Police in California say thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month and ripped a pricey watch off his arm.
Police say the victims were all targets of organized groups who steal high-end watches in large crowds during events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Las Vegas Raiders 34-18
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— In the second quarter, with the Broncos trailing 10-3 and defending the goal line, Gardner Minshew threw an interception to Patrick Surtain II, who returned it for a 100-yard touchdown. The pick-six was one of Surtain’s two interceptions on the night.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Verdugo's go-ahead single and acrobatic catch lift Yankees over Royals 6-5 in ALDS opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Verdugo hit a tiebreaking single in the seventh inning and saved at least one run with a sliding catch along the left-field line, boosting the New York Yankees over the Kansas City Royals 6-5 on Saturday night in their AL Division Series opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clayton Kershaw won't pitch for the Dodgers in playoffs after big toe injury fails to heal
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Clayton Kershaw, sidelined since late August with a toe injury, won’t pitch again this season for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake ready for road test: Unbeaten streak at stake against San Jose Earthquakes
item.description: Real Salt Lake (4th place Western Conference, 53 points) kept a clean sheet at home against Minnesota on Wednesday and now head back on the road with a four-match unbeaten streak to face the San Jose Earthquakes (14th place, Western Conference, 21 points) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4
